# Partner Market Global

> Curated B2B showcase connecting companies that have import, export, distribution, franchise, licensing, private label / OEM and country partner opportunities with qualified international partners. Operated by Alex de Vries of De Vries Sales Consultancy. 100% commission-based — no listing fees, no subscription packages.

Canonical site: https://partner-market-global2.pages.dev
Last updated: 2026-07-09
Languages: English (en), Spanish (es), French (fr), German (de), Dutch (nl), Italian (it), Portuguese (pt), Chinese (zh), Japanese (ja), Korean (ko), Arabic (ar), Hindi (hi), Russian (ru) — all pages available under /{locale}/.

## What Partner Market Global Is

Partner Market Global is a curated business opportunity showcase, not an open directory. Every listing is reviewed, verified and structured into a consistent profile covering: opportunity type, sector, origin country, target markets, ideal partner profile, commercial model, territory availability, investment or working-capital expectation, credentials, available documents, risk notes and next steps.

Opportunity types covered: import, export, distribution rights, franchise, master franchise, licensing, brand partnership, private label, OEM and country partner opportunities.

Commercial model: 100% commission-based. Commission scope, trigger, territory and timing are agreed in writing before representation starts. Browsing and submitting inquiries is free for prospective partners.

## Primary Pages

- /en/ — platform overview, featured opportunities and FAQ
- /en/opportunities/ — all curated business opportunity listings with search and filters
- /en/opportunities/[slug]/ — individual opportunity profile with description, credentials, partner requirements, risk notes and inquiry form
- /en/japan/ — JIP Japan hub: pre-screened Japanese commercial partnerships, distribution rights and franchise listings
- /en/list-your-opportunity/ — for companies that want to list products, services, franchises or business opportunities
- /en/commercial-terms/ — commission-based commercial terms available on inquiry
- /en/curation-process/ — review, verification and curation process
- /en/about/ — platform story and De Vries Sales Consultancy operator context
- /en/contact/ — inquiry and contact page
- /en/privacy-policy/ — privacy, consent and data handling policy
- /en/terms/ — terms of use and disclaimer

## Current Opportunities

Indonesian opportunities:
- Ralalifood — retort food manufacturer seeking international distributors and private label / OEM clients. /en/opportunities/ralalifood-indonesia-retort-food-distributors-private-label-oem/
- Moja Coffee Bali — Indonesian coffee brand seeking international distributors. /en/opportunities/moja-coffee-bali-indonesian-coffee-brand-international-distributors/

Japanese opportunities (JIP Japan, pre-screened):
- AIR TWOKYO (Rub-Lab) — anime-licensed artistic apparel brand seeking retail, distribution and collaboration partners in Europe and Southeast Asia. /en/opportunities/air-twokyo-anime-licensed-apparel/
- u technologies (Unagi / Unatan group) — Japanese unagi restaurant master franchise. /en/opportunities/u-technologies-unagi-master-franchise/
- Fujichiku — Fujiaya Beef whole-carcass distribution partner opportunity. /en/opportunities/fujichiku-fujiaya-beef-whole-carcass-distribution/
- Nose Shuzo — Japanese beverage distribution opportunity. /en/opportunities/nose-shuzo-japanese-beverage-distribution/
- Okayama Tenobe Somen — hand-stretched udon and somen noodle distribution. /en/opportunities/okayama-tenobe-somen-hand-stretched-noodles/
- IMAI (IMAI BAG / N&F design) — leather goods retail and trading partnership. /en/opportunities/imai-leather-goods-retail-partnership/
- Field Club — FRP sculpture and theme-park production partnership. /en/opportunities/field-club-frp-theme-park-sculpture-partnership/
- Do-Best (AC MAKEUP TOKYO / U R GLAM) — affordable Japanese cosmetics distribution. /en/opportunities/do-best-budget-cosmetics-distribution/
- Ebisu Shiryo — recycled plastics sourcing and facility opportunity (Indonesia focus). /en/opportunities/ebisu-shiryo-recycled-plastics-indonesia-sourcing/
- Yachiyo Mengyo — JAS/Halal thin udon and Handa somen EU distribution. /en/opportunities/yachiyo-mengyo-handa-somen-eu-distribution/

Other:
- Licensed blind box and plush toy retail distribution (Chinese manufacturer, Europe focus). /en/opportunities/licensed-blind-box-plush-retail-partnership/

Note: the anime apparel brand is correctly named "AIR TWOKYO" (by Rub-Lab, Japan). Any reference to "Twokyo Air" is an outdated name for the same single opportunity.

## Who Should Use This Site

- Importers, exporters and distributors looking for verified products and brands to represent
- Retail groups, e-commerce operators and specialty retailers seeking new brands
- Master franchise and franchise operators evaluating international concepts
- Private label / OEM buyers looking for manufacturers
- Companies that want to present an international expansion opportunity to qualified partners

## Important Trust And Compliance Notes

Partner Market Global curates and showcases opportunities but does not guarantee commercial success, profitability, financing, market entry approval, legal compliance or partner performance.

Partner Market Global does not provide legal, financial, investment, franchise, tax or securities advice. Companies and interested partners are responsible for their own due diligence, professional advice and market-specific compliance.

Qualified inquiries may be shared with the relevant opportunity owner when the inquirer has consented or when needed to provide the requested service.

## Entity Facts

- Site name: Partner Market Global
- Tagline: Curated. Verified. Global.
- Operator: Alex de Vries, De Vries Sales Consultancy
- Operator website: https://www.devriessalesconsultancy.com
- Contact email: listings@partnermarketglobal.com
- Commercial model: 100% commission-based, terms on inquiry
